metadata.description: Start an isolated Postgres container for E2E tests (port 5433, database cms-e2e)

dx:postgres.command: (docker ps -q -f name=postgres-cms-e2e | grep -q . || docker run --name postgres-cms-e2e --rm -d --env-file apps/cms-e2e/.env.e2e -p 5433:5432 postgres) && until docker exec postgres-cms-e2e pg_isready -q; do sleep 1; done

metadata.description: Reset and re-seed the E2E database from a clean state
Open the Playwright HTML test report

options.command: test -d dist/.playwright/apps/cms-e2e/playwright-report && pnpm exec playwright show-report dist/.playwright/apps/cms-e2e/playwright-report || echo 'Test report not found. Run: nx e2e cms-e2e'
test -f .coverage/index.html && open .coverage/index.html || echo 'Coverage report not found. Run: nx e2e cms-e2e'
